userMessage: I'm a freelance architect, 45 years old, married with 2 children
assistantMessage:
As a freelance architect with a family to support, your situation requires particular attention when it comes to protection. At 45, with a spouse and two children depending on your income, the risk of premature death is your primary concern. An adequate death benefit guarantees your family's financial security and the continuity of their standard of living in case of your passing.

Your freelance architecture practice also exposes you to the risk of prolonged work stoppage. In case of illness or accident, the loss of income can directly impact your family and the sustainability of your firm. Since Social Security benefits for self-employed professionals are limited, supplementary disability income coverage is essential to maintain your earnings during a period of inactivity.

MetLife offers solutions tailored to your family profile. The Super Novaterm contract provides adjustable death benefit capital that evolves with your family situation, with education annuity options for your children. Our disability income coverage complements your protection with daily allowances from the first day of absence. I recommend speaking with a MetLife advisor to refine these recommendations.

risks.label: Premature death
risks.description: With a spouse and two dependent children, protecting your family in case of death is an absolute priority.

risks.label: Prolonged work stoppage
risks.description: As a freelancer, a prolonged work stoppage directly impacts your entire family's income.

risks.label: Disability
risks.description: A permanent disability would compromise your ability to practice and provide for your family's needs.

products.name: Super Novaterm
products.relevance: Adjustable death benefit capital with education annuity options for your children, tailored to your family situation.

products.name: Disability Income Protection
products.relevance: Daily allowances ensuring the maintenance of your family income in case of work stoppage.

partners.relevance: Legal protection and support for freelance architects facing professional disputes.
Optimized accounting and administrative management to sustain your architecture practice.

resources.title: Protecting your family as a self-employed professional
